name: King Candlewick
description: The lit candle empowers the king until a high attack roll extinguishes it.

name: Gnarlfang the Packlord
description: Summons packlings during the fight.

name: Murkfin Tide King
description: Heals through a tide totem unless interrupted by a strong attack.

name: Zariss the Coil Queen
description: Alternates between a damage shield and an empowered assault stance.

name: Grumbar Earthbreaker
description: Warns before unleashing a heavy earthquake.

name: Stormtalon Matriarch
description: Takes flight to evade a strike, then dives for extra damage.

name: Xavros Felwhisper
description: Periodically drains health and restores his own.

name: Azarak the Web Tyrant
description: Binds a minion or weakens the hero’s next attack.

name: Lord Coldgrave
description: Freezes the hero and reduces the next attack.

name: Emperor Blackfuse
description: Plants timed explosives that detonate two turns later.

name: Nexus Lord Vaelrix
description: Phases out to avoid a strike, then returns with an ambush.

name: High Seer Skyrend
description: Calls war winds that permanently raise boss attack during the battle.

name: Akoru the Soulkeeper
description: Summons soul echoes to fight beside him.

name: Sunblade Grand Magister
description: Steals a point of attack and converts it into boss power.

name: Gorvak the Unchained
description: Gains attack at 75%, 50% and 25% health.

name: The Drowned Ancient
description: Begins with bark armour and periodically regenerates it.

name: Astralax the Devourer
description: Absorbs powerful rolls and discharges stored arcane energy.

name: Prototype Omega-Reaver
description: Cycles through armour, assault and repair configurations.

name: ZLR Arena Overlord
description: Unleashes a second strike on scheduled attack turns.

name: CATS, Master of the Base
description: A multi-stage encounter with drones and a charged laser.
